nasb.text: Who sit among graves and spend the night in secret places; Who eat swine’s flesh, And the broth of unclean meat is in their pots.

esv.text: who sit in tombs, and spend the night in secret places; who eat pig’s flesh, and broth of tainted meat is in their vessels;

cnv.text: 坐在墳墓之間，在隱密處過夜，吃豬肉， 他們的器皿中有不潔之物作的湯，

ccb.text: 坐在坟场里， 宿在隐秘处。 他们吃猪肉， 用不洁之物做汤，

csbs.text: 他们坐在坟墓之间，在隐秘处过夜； 他们吃猪肉，器皿中有不洁之肉做的汤；
